final_text:
Now I have all the information needed. The `to_python` method in `ModelChoiceField` raises a `ValidationError` without passing `params={'value': value}`, unlike `ChoiceField.validate` which correctly passes params.

```json
{"file":"django/forms/models.py","class":"ModelChoiceField","method":"to_python","parent_class":"ChoiceField","fix_summary":"The raise ValidationError call needs to pass params={'value': value} so that the %(value)s placeholder in the error message is substituted with the actual invalid value the user submitted."}
```

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The raise ValidationError call needs to pass params={'value': value} so that the %(value)s placeholder in the error message is substituted with the actual invalid value the user submitted.
